title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Verify account deletion flow in App Settings: confirmation dialog appears, cancel keeps user logged in, confirm logs user out and removes from Cloud tenant.
steps: Open the delete icon in App Settings under General > Account tab.
Test cancel: click cancel, verify dialog closes, user stays logged in, and user remains on Cloud.
Test confirm: click confirm, verify dialog closes, a spinner appears, an 'Account Deleted' popup appears briefly, user is logged out, and user is removed from Cloud tenant.
expected: Cancel: Dialog closes, user stays logged in, user remains on Cloud. Confirm: Dialog closes, spinner appears, "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly, user is logged out and removed from Cloud tenant.
